site_reliability_guardian.name: site_reliability_guardian
site_reliability_guardian.description: Automation action to start a Site Reliability Guardian validation

eventTrigger.filterQuery:
matchesValue(event.kind,"SDLC_EVENT") and
matchesValue(event.type,"app-deployed.validated") and
matchesValue(status,"succeeded") and
matchesValue(owner,"{{ .owner }}") and
matchesValue(proj_name,"{{ .proj_name }}") and
matchesValue(stage,"{{ .stage }}")

value.query:
matchesValue(event.kind,"SDLC_EVENT") and
matchesValue(event.type,"app-deployed.validated") and
matchesValue(status,"succeeded") and
matchesValue(owner,"{{ .owner }}") and
matchesValue(proj_name,"{{ .proj_name }}") and
matchesValue(stage,"{{ .stage }}")
